prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed for acrolein (8 atoms: O, C, C, C, H, H, H, H) at the DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in the gas phase using PySCF via chemkit. Partial charges via Mulliken scheme. Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied .xyz file (no re-optimization). Charge/multiplicity: neutral (0, 1), cation (N−1: +1, 2), anion (N+1: −1, 2). All three SCF calculations converged. Integrity checks all passed (ok: true, trustworthy: true); both f+ and f− sum exactly to 1.0000. No engine warnings reported. Headline value reported is the largest f+ index: atom 4 (C, β-carbon / Michael acceptor carbon), f+ = 0.64232102 — the most electrophilic site in the molecule. The most nucleophilic site is atom 1 (O, carbonyl oxygen) with f− = 0.39388616. CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp [input.xyz].
